verses.latin_vulgate: Locutusque est Dominus ad Moysen, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה לֵּאמֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Mense primo, prima die mensis, eriges tabernaculum testimonii,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּיוֹם־הַחֹ֥דֶשׁ הָרִאשׁ֖וֹן בְּאֶחָ֣ד לַחֹ֑דֶשׁ תָּקִ֕ים אֶת־מִשְׁכַּ֖ן אֹ֥הֶל מוֹעֵֽד׃
verses.king_james: On the first day of the first month shalt thou set up the tabernacle of the tent of the congregation.

verses.latin_vulgate: et pones in eo arcam, dimittesque ante illam velum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׂמְתָּ֣ שָׁ֔ם אֵ֖ת אֲר֣וֹן הָעֵד֑וּת וְסַכֹּתָ֥ עַל־הָאָרֹ֖ן אֶת־הַפָּרֹֽכֶת׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt put therein the ark of the testimony, and cover the ark with the vail.

verses.latin_vulgate: et illata mensa, pones super eam quæ rite præcepta sunt. Candelabrum stabit cum lucernis suis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֵבֵאתָ֙ אֶת־הַשֻּׁלְחָ֔ן וְעָרַכְתָּ֖ אֶת־עֶרְכּ֑וֹ וְהֵבֵאתָ֙ אֶת־הַמְּנֹרָ֔ה וְהַעֲלֵיתָ֖ אֶת־נֵרֹתֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt bring in the table, and set in order the things that are to be set in order upon it; and thou shalt bring in the candlestick, and light the lamps thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: et altare aureum, in quo adoletur incensum, coram arca testimonii. Tentorium in introitu tabernaculi pones,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַתָּ֞ה אֶת־מִזְבַּ֤ח הַזָּהָב֙ לִקְטֹ֔רֶת לִפְנֵ֖י אֲר֣וֹן הָעֵדֻ֑ת וְשַׂמְתָּ֛ אֶת־מָסַ֥ךְ הַפֶּ֖תַח לַמִּשְׁכָּֽן׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt set the altar of gold for the incense before the ark of the testimony, and put the hanging of the door to the tabernacle.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ante illud altare holocausti :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָ֣תַתָּ֔ה אֵ֖ת מִזְבַּ֣ח הָעֹלָ֑ה לִפְנֵ֕י פֶּ֖תַח מִשְׁכַּ֥ן אֹֽהֶל־מוֹעֵֽד׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt set the altar of the burnt offering before the door of the tabernacle of the tent of the congregation.

verses.latin_vulgate: labrum inter altare et tabernaculum, quod implebis aqua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָֽתַתָּ֙ אֶת־הַכִּיֹּ֔ר בֵּֽין־אֹ֥הֶל מוֹעֵ֖ד וּבֵ֣ין הַמִּזְבֵּ֑חַ וְנָתַתָּ֥ שָׁ֖ם מָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt set the laver between the tent of the congregation and the altar, and shalt put water therein.

verses.latin_vulgate: Circumdabisque atrium tentoriis, et ingressum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׂמְתָּ֥ אֶת־הֶחָצֵ֖ר סָבִ֑יב וְנָ֣תַתָּ֔ אֶת־מָסַ֖ךְ שַׁ֥עַר הֶחָצֵֽר׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt set up the court round about, and hang up the hanging at the court gate.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et assumpto unctionis oleo unges tabernaculum cum vasis suis, ut sanctificentur :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָקַחְתָּ֙ אֶת־שֶׁ֣מֶן הַמִּשְׁחָ֔ה וּמָשַׁחְתָּ֥ אֶת־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֖ן וְאֶת־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁר־בּ֑וֹ וְקִדַּשְׁתָּ֥ אֹת֛וֹ וְאֶת־כׇּל־כֵּלָ֖יו וְהָ֥יָה קֹֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt take the anointing oil, and anoint the tabernacle, and all that is therein, and shalt hallow it, and all the vessels thereof: and it shall be holy.

verses.latin_vulgate: altare holocausti et omnia vasa ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמָשַׁחְתָּ֛ אֶת־מִזְבַּ֥ח הָעֹלָ֖ה וְאֶת־כׇּל־כֵּלָ֑יו וְקִדַּשְׁתָּ֙ אֶת־הַמִּזְבֵּ֔חַ וְהָיָ֥ה הַמִּזְבֵּ֖חַ קֹ֥דֶשׁ קׇֽדָשִֽׁים׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt anoint the altar of the burnt offering, and all his vessels, and sanctify the altar: and it shall be an altar most holy.

verses.latin_vulgate: labrum cum basi sua : omnia unctionis oleo consecrabis, ut sint Sancta sanctorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמָשַׁחְתָּ֥ אֶת־הַכִּיֹּ֖ר וְאֶת־כַּנּ֑וֹ וְקִדַּשְׁתָּ֖ אֹתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt anoint the laver and his foot, and sanctify it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Applicabisque Aaron et filios ejus ad fores tabernaculi testimonii, et lotos aqua
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִקְרַבְתָּ֤ אֶֽת־אַהֲרֹן֙ וְאֶת־בָּנָ֔יו אֶל־פֶּ֖תַח אֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֑ד וְרָחַצְתָּ֥ אֹתָ֖ם בַּמָּֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt bring Aaron and his sons unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, and wash them with water.

verses.latin_vulgate: indues sanctis vestibus, ut ministrent mihi, et unctio eorum in sacerdotium sempiternum proficiat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִלְבַּשְׁתָּ֙ אֶֽת־אַהֲרֹ֔ן אֵ֖ת בִּגְדֵ֣י הַקֹּ֑דֶשׁ וּמָשַׁחְתָּ֥ אֹת֛וֹ וְקִדַּשְׁתָּ֥ אֹת֖וֹ וְכִהֵ֥ן לִֽי׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt put upon Aaron the holy garments, and anoint him, and sanctify him; that he may minister unto me in the priest’s office.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque Moyses omnia quæ præceperat Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־בָּנָ֖יו תַּקְרִ֑יב וְהִלְבַּשְׁתָּ֥ אֹתָ֖ם כֻּתֳּנֹֽת׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt bring his sons, and clothe them with coats:

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur mense primo anni secundi, prima die mensis, collocatum est tabernaculum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמָשַׁחְתָּ֣ אֹתָ֗ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֤ר מָשַׁ֙חְתָּ֙ אֶת־אֲבִיהֶ֔ם וְכִהֲנ֖וּ לִ֑י וְ֠הָיְתָ֠ה לִהְיֹ֨ת לָהֶ֧ם מׇשְׁחָתָ֛ם לִכְהֻנַּ֥ת עוֹלָ֖ם לְדֹרֹתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt anoint them, as thou didst anoint their father, that they may minister unto me in the priest’s office: for their anointing shall surely be an everlasting priesthood throughout their generations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque Moyses omnia quæ præceperat Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֖עַשׂ מֹשֶׁ֑ה כְּ֠כֹ֠ל אֲשֶׁ֨ר צִוָּ֧ה יְהֹוָ֛ה אֹת֖וֹ כֵּ֥ן עָשָֽׂה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Thus did Moses: according to all that the Lord commanded him, so did he.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur mense primo anni secundi, prima die mensis, collocatum est tabernaculum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֞י בַּחֹ֧דֶשׁ הָרִאשׁ֛וֹן בַּשָּׁנָ֥ה הַשֵּׁנִ֖ית בְּאֶחָ֣ד לַחֹ֑דֶשׁ הוּקַ֖ם הַמִּשְׁכָּֽן׃
verses.king_james: And it came to pass in the first month in the second year, on the first day of the month, that the tabernacle was reared up.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erexitque Moyses illud, et posuit tabulas ac bases et vectes, statuitque columnas,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֨קֶם מֹשֶׁ֜ה אֶת־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֗ן וַיִּתֵּן֙ אֶת־אֲדָנָ֔יו וַיָּ֙שֶׂם֙ אֶת־קְרָשָׁ֔יו וַיִּתֵּ֖ן אֶת־בְּרִיחָ֑יו וַיָּ֖קֶם אֶת־עַמּוּדָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: And Moses reared up the tabernacle, and fastened his sockets, and set up the boards thereof, and put in the bars thereof, and reared up his pillars.

verses.latin_vulgate: et expandit tectum super tabernaculum, imposito desuper operimento, sicut Dominus imperaverat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּפְרֹ֤שׂ אֶת־הָאֹ֙הֶל֙ עַל־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֔ן וַיָּ֜שֶׂם אֶת־מִכְסֵ֥ה הָאֹ֛הֶל עָלָ֖יו מִלְמָ֑עְלָה כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And he spread abroad the tent over the tabernacle, and put the covering of the tent above upon it; as the Lord commanded Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuit et testimonium in arca, subditis infra vectibus, et oraculum desuper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֞ח וַיִּתֵּ֤ן אֶת־הָעֵדֻת֙ אֶל־הָ֣אָרֹ֔ן וַיָּ֥שֶׂם אֶת־הַבַּדִּ֖ים עַל־הָאָרֹ֑ן וַיִּתֵּ֧ן אֶת־הַכַּפֹּ֛רֶת עַל־הָאָרֹ֖ן מִלְמָֽעְלָה׃
verses.king_james: And he took and put the testimony into the ark, and set the staves on the ark, and put the mercy seat above upon the ark:

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque intulisset arcam in tabernaculum, appendit ante eam velum ut expleret Domini jussionem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֵ֣א אֶת־הָאָרֹן֮ אֶל־הַמִּשְׁכָּן֒ וַיָּ֗שֶׂם אֵ֚ת פָּרֹ֣כֶת הַמָּסָ֔ךְ וַיָּ֕סֶךְ עַ֖ל אֲר֣וֹן הָעֵד֑וּת כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And he brought the ark into the tabernacle, and set up the vail of the covering, and covered the ark of the testimony; as the Lord commanded Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuit et mensam in tabernaculo testimonii ad plagam septentrionalem extra velum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֤ן אֶת־הַשֻּׁלְחָן֙ בְּאֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֔ד עַ֛ל יֶ֥רֶךְ הַמִּשְׁכָּ֖ן צָפֹ֑נָה מִח֖וּץ לַפָּרֹֽכֶת׃
verses.king_james: And he put the table in the tent of the congregation, upon the side of the tabernacle northward, without the vail.

verses.latin_vulgate: ordinatis coram propositionis panibus, sicut præceperat Dominus Moysi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲרֹ֥ךְ עָלָ֛יו עֵ֥רֶךְ לֶ֖חֶם לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And he set the bread in order upon it before the Lord; as the Lord had commanded Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuit et candelabrum in tabernaculo testimonii e regione mensæ in parte australi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֤שֶׂם אֶת־הַמְּנֹרָה֙ בְּאֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֔ד נֹ֖כַח הַשֻּׁלְחָ֑ן עַ֛ל יֶ֥רֶךְ הַמִּשְׁכָּ֖ן נֶֽגְבָּה׃
verses.king_james: And he put the candlestick in the tent of the congregation, over against the table, on the side of the tabernacle southward.

verses.latin_vulgate: locatis per ordinem lucernis, juxta præceptum Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַל הַנֵּרֹ֖ת לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And he lighted the lamps before the Lord; as the Lord commanded Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuit et altare aureum sub tecto testimonii contra velum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֛שֶׂם אֶת־מִזְבַּ֥ח הַזָּהָ֖ב בְּאֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֑ד לִפְנֵ֖י הַפָּרֹֽכֶת׃
verses.king_james: And he put the golden altar in the tent of the congregation before the vail:

verses.latin_vulgate: et adolevit super eo incensum aromatum, sicut jusserat Dominus Moysi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּקְטֵ֥ר עָלָ֖יו קְטֹ֣רֶת סַמִּ֑ים כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And he burnt sweet incense thereon; as the Lord commanded Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuit et tentorium in introitu tabernaculi testimonii,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֛שֶׂם אֶת־מָסַ֥ךְ הַפֶּ֖תַח לַמִּשְׁכָּֽן׃
verses.king_james: And he set up the hanging at the door of the tabernacle.

verses.latin_vulgate: et altare holocausti in vestibulo testimonii, offerens in eo holocaustum, et sacrificia, ut Dominus imperaverat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵת֙ מִזְבַּ֣ח הָעֹלָ֔ה שָׂ֕ם פֶּ֖תַח מִשְׁכַּ֣ן אֹֽהֶל־מוֹעֵ֑ד וַיַּ֣עַל עָלָ֗יו אֶת־הָעֹלָה֙ וְאֶת־הַמִּנְחָ֔ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And he put the altar of burnt offering by the door of the tabernacle of the tent of the congregation, and offered upon it the burnt offering and the meat offering; as the Lord commanded Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Labrum quoque statuit inter tabernaculum testimonii et altare, implens illud aqua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֙שֶׂם֙ אֶת־הַכִּיֹּ֔ר בֵּֽין־אֹ֥הֶל מוֹעֵ֖ד וּבֵ֣ין הַמִּזְבֵּ֑חַ וַיִּתֵּ֥ן שָׁ֛מָּה מַ֖יִם לְרׇחְצָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And he set the laver between the tent of the congregation and the altar, and put water there, to wash withal.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laveruntque Moyses et Aaron ac filii ejus manus suas et pedes,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָחֲצ֣וּ מִמֶּ֔נּוּ מֹשֶׁ֖ה וְאַהֲרֹ֣ן וּבָנָ֑יו אֶת־יְדֵיהֶ֖ם וְאֶת־רַגְלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: And Moses and Aaron and his sons washed their hands and their feet thereat:

verses.latin_vulgate: cum ingrederentur tectum fœderis, et accederent ad altare, sicut præceperat Dominus Moysi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּבֹאָ֞ם אֶל־אֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֗ד וּבְקׇרְבָתָ֛ם אֶל־הַמִּזְבֵּ֖חַ יִרְחָ֑צוּ כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: When they went into the tent of the congregation, and when they came near unto the altar, they washed; as the Lord commanded Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erexit et atrium per gyrum tabernaculi et altaris, ducto in introitu ejus tentorio.   Postquam omnia perfecta sunt,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣קֶם אֶת־הֶחָצֵ֗ר סָבִיב֙ לַמִּשְׁכָּ֣ן וְלַמִּזְבֵּ֔חַ וַיִּתֵּ֕ן אֶת־מָסַ֖ךְ שַׁ֣עַר הֶחָצֵ֑ר וַיְכַ֥ל מֹשֶׁ֖ה אֶת־הַמְּלָאכָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And he reared up the court round about the tabernacle and the altar, and set up the hanging of the court gate. So Moses finished the work.

verses.latin_vulgate: operuit nubes tabernaculum testimonii, et gloria Domini implevit illud.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְכַ֥ס הֶעָנָ֖ן אֶת־אֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֑ד וּכְב֣וֹד יְהֹוָ֔ה מָלֵ֖א אֶת־הַמִּשְׁכָּֽן׃
verses.king_james: Then a cloud covered the tent of the congregation, and the glory of the Lord filled the tabernacle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nec poterat Moyses ingredi tectum fœderis, nube operiente omnia, et majestate Domini coruscante, quia cuncta nubes operuerat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־יָכֹ֣ל מֹשֶׁ֗ה לָבוֹא֙ אֶל־אֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֔ד כִּֽי־שָׁכַ֥ן עָלָ֖יו הֶעָנָ֑ן וּכְב֣וֹד יְהֹוָ֔ה מָלֵ֖א אֶת־הַמִּשְׁכָּֽן׃
verses.king_james: And Moses was not able to enter into the tent of the congregation, because the cloud abode thereon, and the glory of the Lord filled the tabernacle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Siquando nubes tabernaculum deserebat, proficiscebantur filii Israël per turmas suas :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְהֵעָל֤וֹת הֶֽעָנָן֙ מֵעַ֣ל הַמִּשְׁכָּ֔ן יִסְע֖וּ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל בְּכֹ֖ל מַסְעֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: And when the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, the children of Israel went onward in all their journeys:

verses.latin_vulgate: si pendebat desuper, manebant in eodem loco.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־לֹ֥א יֵעָלֶ֖ה הֶעָנָ֑ן וְלֹ֣א יִסְע֔וּ עַד־י֖וֹם הֵעָלֹתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: But if the cloud were not taken up, then they journeyed not till the day that it was taken up.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nubes quippe Domini incubabat per diem tabernaculo, et ignis in nocte, videntibus cunctis populis Israël per cunctas mansiones suas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי֩ עֲנַ֨ן יְהֹוָ֤ה עַֽל־הַמִּשְׁכָּן֙ יוֹמָ֔ם וְאֵ֕שׁ תִּהְיֶ֥ה לַ֖יְלָה בּ֑וֹ לְעֵינֵ֥י כׇל־בֵּֽית־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בְּכׇל־מַסְעֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: For the cloud of the Lord was upon the tabernacle by day, and fire was on it by night, in the sight of all the house of Israel, throughout all their journeys.
